title: cyclosorus dicranogramma
intro: Cyclosorus dicranogramma, also known as the 'Rigid Shield Fern', is a species of fern native to Southeast Asia and China. The plant has been used in traditional medicine, with its medicinal properties attributed to its high content of flavonoids, saponins, and terpenoids, which have been shown to exhibit anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Cyclosorus dicranogramma include its potential to aid in the treatment of various conditions, such as fever, rheumatism, and skin disorders, as well as its ability to boost the immune system and reduce oxidative stress. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and capsules, making it a popular ingredient in traditional remedies and modern supplements.
